_note: TOMBSTONE — intentionally NOT a valid gallops.
JJr_d9f: Retired in-repo gallops (heat B3 founding-and-cutover, 2026-07-21). Heat/pace state now lives in the studbook clone (jjqs_studbook), never in this file.
